name: deslop
description: Remove AI-generated code slop from a branch. Use when cleaning up AI-generated code, removing unnecessary comments, defensive checks, or type casts. Checks diff against main and fixes style inconsistencies.
capabilities: Review git diff against main branch for AI-generated patterns
Identify and remove excessive comments inconsistent with codebase style
Eliminate unnecessary defensive checks and try-catch blocks in trusted code paths
Fix inline imports and type casts to any in Python and TypeScript
Report concise summary of cleanup actions performed
Preserve legitimate functional changes while removing stylistic bloat
author: getsentry
securitySummary: Pure prompt-based skill with no executable code. All 37 static findings are false positives from scanning metadata files. The skill provides behavioral guidelines for cleaning AI-generated code patterns through natural language instructions only.
valueStatement: AI-generated code often includes excessive comments, defensive checks, and unnecessary patterns. This skill reviews git diffs against main and systematically removes code slop while preserving legitimate changes.
limitations: Only operates on changed files in the current branch diff
Requires manual review to prevent removal of legitimate code patterns
Does not fix logic bugs or improve algorithmic efficiency
Cannot detect slop patterns in files unchanged from main branch

useCases.title: Clean Feature Branches Before PR
useCases.description: Remove AI-generated patterns before submitting pull requests for cleaner code review and faster approval

useCases.title: Enforce Team Code Standards
useCases.description: Systematically identify and flag AI slop patterns in submitted code changes during review process

useCases.title: Maintain Codebase Quality Standards
useCases.description: Ensure AI-assisted contributions meet team style guidelines before merging to main branch

promptTemplates.title: Basic Branch Cleanup
promptTemplates.prompt: Use the deslop skill to clean up this branch. Review the diff against main and remove all AI-generated slop.

promptTemplates.title: Remove Comments Only
promptTemplates.prompt: Use deslop to remove only the extra comments from this branch. Keep defensive checks and try-catch blocks.

promptTemplates.title: Full Slop Removal
promptTemplates.prompt: Run deslop with full scope. Remove comments, defensive checks, type casts to any, and inline imports from my branch.

promptTemplates.title: Report Only Mode
promptTemplates.prompt: Use deslop to identify all slop patterns in this branch. Report what should be removed without making any changes.

bestPractices: Review slop removal suggestions before accepting changes to ensure legitimate code is preserved
Run deslop after AI code generation but before committing to keep diffs clean and reviewable
Use deslop during code review phase to maintain consistent codebase style across team contributions
antiPatterns: Applying deslop to branches with unrelated changes from multiple contributors without coordination
Running deslop without reviewing what will be removed first and blindly accepting all suggestions
Expecting deslop to fix logic bugs, improve algorithmic efficiency, or handle security vulnerabilities

faq.question: Does deslop work with all git workflows?
faq.answer: Yes. Deslop works with any git-based workflow. It uses git diff main...HEAD by default to compare changes.

faq.question: What specific patterns does deslop remove?
faq.answer: Excessive comments, unnecessary defensive checks, type casts to any, inline imports, and other AI-generated style inconsistencies.

faq.question: Can deslop integrate with CI/CD pipelines?
faq.answer: Deslop is an AI skill for interactive use, not a standalone CI tool. Use it during development or code review phases.

faq.question: Is my code safe when using deslop?
faq.answer: Deslop only provides guidelines to the AI platform. All code changes require your explicit approval before being applied.

faq.question: Why are my legitimate changes being flagged for removal?
faq.answer: Deslop may misinterpret some patterns as slop. Always review suggestions carefully and restore any legitimate code manually.

faq.question: How does deslop differ from traditional linters?
faq.answer: Linters enforce syntax and style rules. Deslop targets AI-specific code patterns and context that linters cannot detect.
